name: Griha Laxmi
overview: Laxmi, a housewife in Betalgadh, stumbles upon weed during a police chase and starts selling it to save her family, navigating danger, secrets, and morality to become Betalgadh's queen of weed.

trailers.title: Griha Laxmi - Official Trailer| Hina Khan|Chunky Pandey|Rahul Dev|Dibyendu | EPIC ON Original 16 Jan
